Hero.subtitle: Discover wedding halls, salons, and event spaces across Algeria. Connect directly with venue owners and book your dream location.

HowItWorks.subtitle: Whether you're looking for a venue or listing one, we make it easy.

customer.title: For Customers
customer.step1_desc: Explore hundreds of venues. Filter by location, category, capacity, and price range.
customer.step2_desc: Check out photos, videos, amenities, and all the information you need about each venue.
customer.step3_desc: Reach out directly via WhatsApp, phone, or social media. Book your perfect venue!

owner.title: For Venue Owners
owner.step1_desc: Create your account in minutes. It's completely free for venue owners.
owner.step2_desc: Upload photos, videos, and details. Showcase what makes your venue special.
owner.step3_desc: Receive direct inquiries from interested customers. Grow your business!

Features.subtitle: We make it simple to discover, compare, and book the perfect venue for your special event.

items.discovery_desc: Browse hundreds of venues across all 58 wilayas of Algeria. Find the perfect space for your event in minutes.
items.contact_desc: Connect instantly with venue owners via WhatsApp, phone, or social media. No intermediaries, no hidden fees.
items.filtering_desc: Filter venues by wilaya, city, or neighborhood. Find venues near you or in your preferred location.
items.media_desc: View high-quality photos and videos of each venue. Get a real feel for the space before you visit.
items.listing_desc: Venue owners can list their spaces for free. Reach thousands of potential customers at no cost.
items.response_desc: Get fast responses from venue owners. Most inquiries are answered within hours, not days.

Pricing.subtitle: We believe venue owners should focus on their business, not platform fees.

benefits.reach_desc: Get your venue in front of thousands of people looking for event spaces.
benefits.fees_desc: Keep 100% of your bookings. We don't charge any commission.
benefits.management_desc: Simple dashboard to manage your venue listing and inquiries.
benefits.performance_desc: See how many views and inquiries your venue receives.

Pricing.trust_message: Join hundreds of venue owners already growing their business with us.

FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about listing your venue.

items.list_q: How do I list my venue on the platform?
items.list_a: Simply create a free account, fill in your venue details, upload photos and videos, and submit for review. Once approved, your venue will be visible to thousands of potential customers.
items.free_q: Is it really free for venue owners?
items.free_a: Yes! Listing your venue is completely free. We don't charge any subscription fees, commission, or hidden costs. You keep 100% of your bookings.
items.approval_q: How long does the approval process take?
items.approval_a: We review new venue listings within 24-48 hours. Make sure to provide accurate information and quality photos to speed up the approval process.
items.contact_a: Customers can contact you directly through the contact information you provide - phone, WhatsApp, email, or social media links. We display all your contact options on your venue page.
items.edit_q: Can I edit my venue listing after it's published?
items.edit_a: Absolutely! You can update your venue photos, description, pricing, and contact information anytime through your dashboard. Major changes may require re-approval.
items.types_q: What types of venues can I list?
items.types_a: We accept all types of event venues including wedding halls, salons, conference rooms, gardens, villas, hotel ballrooms, restaurants with event spaces, and rooftops.
items.safe_a: Yes, we take security seriously. Your personal information is protected and only the contact details you choose to display will be visible to customers.
items.visibility_q: How can I get more visibility for my venue?
items.visibility_a: Complete your profile with high-quality photos and videos, respond quickly to inquiries, and encourage satisfied customers to spread the word. We'll introduce premium features soon!

FAQ.contact_subtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? We're here to help.
